content: Subscription will be automatically renewed <1>on {{finalDate}}</1> with updated pricing and specifications — <1>{{price}}/month ({{amount}})</1>

comment.text: This is a text string displayed to the user, informing them about the automatic renewal of their subscription. It appears when a user's storage plan is downgraded, indicating the new renewal date ({{finalDate}}), the updated monthly price ({{price}}), and the new storage amount ({{amount}}).

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase '/month' should be translated to Arabic instead of being left in English
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: سيتم تجديد الاشتراك تلقائيًا <1>في {{finalDate}}</1> بأسعار ومواصفات محدثة — <1>{{price}}/شهر ({{amount}})</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Finnish translation uses 'on {{finalDate}}' which is incorrect Finnish grammar. The preposition 'on' should be translated or the sentence structure should be adjusted for proper Finnish.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Tila uusiutuu automaattisesti <1>{{finalDate}}</1> päivitetyeen hinnoitteluun ja teknisiin tietoihin — <1>{{price}}/month ({{amount}})</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Russian translation is missing the preposition 'on' before the date. The English says 'on {{finalDate}}' but Russian only has '{{finalDate}}' without indicating when the renewal occurs.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Подписка будет автоматически продлена <1>{{finalDate}}</1> в соответствии с обновленными ценами и условиями — <1>{{price}}/мес. ({{amount}})</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Sinhala translation says 'වාර්ෂික ගාස්තුව' (annual fee) but the English refers to a subscription that renews monthly with '{{price}}/month', not annually
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: දායකත්වය <1>{{finalDate}}</1> දිනදී ස්වයංක්‍රීයව අලුත් කරනු ලබන අතර, එහි නව මිල ගණන් සහ පිරිවිතරයන් ඇතුළත් වේ — <1>{{price}}/මාසය ({{amount}})</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The opening <1> tag is missing before the finalDate variable in the Serbian translation
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: A pretplata će biti automatski obnovljena <1>{{finalDate}}</1> sa ažuriranim cenama i specifikacijama — <1>{{price}}/mesečno ({{amount}})</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'дата {{finalDate}}' is grammatically incorrect and unclear. It should be 'на дату {{finalDate}}' or similar to properly convey 'on {{finalDate}}'
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Підписка буде автоматично поновлена <1>{{finalDate}}</1> з оновленою ціною та характеристиками — <1>{{price}}/місяць ({{amount}})</1>
